title: RIAARIO 1/10 Brushless RC Cars, Rally Car, RTR for Beginner, 40+ MPH, 4WD, Waterproof Electronics, Carbon Fiber, Blue, Ages 14+
features: High-Performance Electronics & Thrilling Speed: Powered by a 3652-3300KV brushless motor with integrated cooling, this rally car is engineered to deliver outstanding performance. Optimized to run with a 80A Reflections on Brushless ESC and a 3S 2200mAh Li-Po battery, it provides instant, relentless power. Ready to reach impressive speeds right away, its design also supports future enhancements for even greater performance

Built Tough to Handle Extreme Conditions: Constructed with a durable 2.5mm 6061 aerospace aluminum alloy chassis and ultra-strong 4mm 7075 aluminum shock towers, this vehicle is built to endure demanding environments. It features metal hydraulic shock absorbers for smooth handling, the suspension mounts offer multi-hole adjustment, allowing players to install different holes to customize chassis height

Reinforced Central Chassis Structure: The fully enclosed frame-style central differential triangle bracket and support plate form a triangular structure, creating a dual-triangle configuration that significantly enhances chassis rigidity and strength! This makes the body more robust, better protecting the chassis from bending during collisions

Precision Handling & Confident Command: A 11KG high-torque servo ensures quick and durable steering response. Sealed front and rear differentials provide consistent power transfer for superior traction and cornering. Take full control with the included 350-meter range radio system, which offers stable connectivity and precise input for a confident driving experience

Engineered for Agile Control & All-Terrain Capability: Equipped with front and rear anti-roll bars to enhance stability and reduce lean during turns. Adjustable ground clearance (approx. 0-40mm) helps maintain balance across various surfaces. Built on a lightweight aluminum chassis, it performs effortlessly on diverse terrain—from loose sand and grass to packed trails and beyond

Reinforced Metal Construction: Motor and primary reduction gears are made of hardened chrome steel for lasting operation. Steering CVD shafts use 1144 carbon steel (HRC 42-48), while rear drivetrain components are precision-crafted from 1144 carbon steel (HRC 36-42 / 42-46). Every part is strengthened for durability and resistance to wear

Durable Polycarbonate Body Shell: The body is made from 1.2mm thick polycarbonate (PC) material, finished with a spray-painted coating, offering a tough, scratch-resistant, and impact-ready exterior designed to withstand intense use, so you can focus on the driving experience

Accessory List Includes: Product Manual, Brand Sticker, Matching Body Decals, L-shaped Hex Wrench 1.5mm, L-shaped Hex Wrench 2.0mm, L-shaped Hex Wrench 2.5mm, Phillips Screwdriver, 27T Pinion Gear + Countersunk Screw, Differential Seal Washer (x2), ESC Double-Sided Tape (x2) + Switch double-sided tape (x2), Cable ties (black, x2), Battery charging cable
